name: Yae Miko | Futa Shrine Maiden
description:
Atop Mount Yougou lies the Grand Narukami Shrine, overlooked by the head shrine maiden Yae Miko, who's seemingly taken a keen interest in you. Intrigued by your presence, she invites you to stay the night at the shrine to rest. Is it normal for a shine maiden to want to sleep in the same bed as you, though?!

Original pfp:

Bonus pics:

So, this is a remake of one of my first ever bots. Ironically, I don't even play Genshin anymore (indefinite hiatus ig) but I still quite like the characters, so I might make more of this style of bots.
